name: mock-broken-backend
description: Agent creates a mock rule to unblock frontend when backend returns 503
prompt: Our inventory API at localhost:9093/api/inventory is returning 503 and the frontend team is blocked. The proxy is running on port 8083 and traffic has been captured. Can you use apxy to mock the endpoint so the frontend can keep working?

checkpoints.description: Agent searches or inspects the failing traffic
Agent creates a mock rule for the broken endpoint
Agent verifies the mock is active

outcome.description: Agent creates a working mock returning 200
